prompt: Extract utility bill summary details from this Alectra Utilities email or bill. Include the bill_number (invoice or bill number), account_number, billing_period (e.g. Jan 15 - Feb 14, 2026), bill_date (date the bill was generated/issued, FORMAT STRICTLY AS YYYY-MM-DD), due_date (payment due date, FORMAT STRICTLY AS YYYY-MM-DD), amount_due (total amount owing), previous_balance, payments_received, new_charges, electricity_charges, delivery_charges, regulatory_charges, debt_retirement_charge, and any late_payment_charge if present. If a total consumption in kWh is shown, extract it as total_kwh. Do NOT extract individual line-item details.

example.text:
Alectra Utilities Corporation
Bill Statement

Account Number: 1234 5678 90
Bill Number: 9876543210
Bill Date: February 15, 2026
Billing Period: January 15, 2026 to February 14, 2026
Due Date: March 7, 2026

Previous Balance: $145.32
Payment Received - Thank you: -$145.32

New Charges:
  Electricity Charges:     $42.18
  Delivery Charges:        $38.72
  Regulatory Charges:      $6.54
  Debt Retirement Charge:  $3.95

Total New Charges:  $91.39

Total Amount Due: $91.39

Total Consumption: 650 kWh
